---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

Describe the problem or limitation this feature would solve.  
*Example: "I often work with Redis Streams but there's no way to view XADD entries."*

## Proposed Solution

Describe what you'd like to see added or changed, including suggested keybindings or UI flow if applicable.

## Alternatives Considered

Any other approaches you've thought of, and why the proposed solution is preferable.

## Additional Context

Links to related issues, Redis documentation, or examples from similar tools.
